data.body:
CUTOVER COMPLETE (commits 84d3516b flip; 2e9bd420 code removal; c282b295 deps+tracing+docs; + 3 audit-remediation passes). All three AC met:
1. DEPS: langchain/langgraph (x3)/langchain-anthropic/langchain-openai/langchain-mcp-adapters/deepagents/langfuse removed from pyproject [agents] (now pydantic-ai-slim[anthropic] + json-repair + pydantic). clean-core/optionality lanes hold (assert the heavy stack is ABSENT in no-extras); import rebar.llm stays light (verified: leaks no langchain/langgraph/deepagents into sys.modules). The LangGraphRunner/DeepAgentsRunner code + langchain helpers were deleted (-1282 LOC).
2. TRACING: re-homed to the optional [tracing] OTel exporter -> Langfuse OTLP endpoint (src/rebar/llm/tracing.py setup_tracing), best-effort, idempotent, no-op without the extra or LANGFUSE keys. WIRED but live fidelity NOT verified, per explicit decision (Langfuse is an OTLP endpoint, not an SDK dep).
3. DOCS: docs/llm-framework.md rewritten for the pydantic-ai-only runtime; the get_prompt-vs-git-canonical drift fixed (prompts are git-canonical; Langfuse never consulted for prompt text).
VALIDATION: pydantic_ai validated LIVE across all 6 operations (tests/external/test_pydantic_ai_cutover_live.py) BEFORE and AFTER the removal; cutover blockers (pydantic_ai budget, review floor, verify_completion langchain-tool leak) root-caused+fixed+code-reviewed. THREE independent residual-reference audits ran; the final verdict is CLEAN (all remaining langchain/langgraph mentions are historical/defensive/parity-gate/Langfuse-OTLP). NOTE: AC originally said 'trace fidelity verified' — amended to wired-but-unverified per the in-session decision.
